Veterans Benefits: Minnesota exempts military retirement pay from state income tax, offers disabled veterans a property-tax market value exclusion, provides short-term financial assistance, education benefits, and free state park passes for qualifying disabled veterans and certain service members.

Description: South-metro Twin Cities suburb with local hospital access, the Minneapolis VA Medical Center nearby, Crystal Lake recreation, Minnesota River Greenway access, Buck Hill, and arts programming around Ames Center. Burnsville is politically liberal at the city-precinct level, has typical home values below many Twin Cities suburbs, and has cold snowy winters.
